name: My mBot2 Rover

additions.label: Left Claw Servo
additions.description: Left half of the Rover claw gripper. Works together with S2.
additions.purpose: Moves the left side of the claw to open and close the gripper.

actions.name: open
actions.description: Set left claw servo to open position.

actions.name: close
actions.description: Set left claw servo to closed position.

additions.label: Right Claw Servo
additions.description: Right half of the Rover claw gripper. Works together with S1.
additions.purpose: Moves the right side of the claw to open and close the gripper.

actions.name: open
actions.description: Set right claw servo to open position.

actions.name: close
actions.description: Set right claw servo to closed position.

notes: Default profile for mBot2 Rover two-servo claw.
